source_pr.title: case: make CTE case be stable
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: guo-shaoge <shaoge1994@163.com>

<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #25034 <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary: CTETestSuite.TestSpillToDisk is unstable. 

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed: 
1. Change CTETestSuite.TestSpillToDisk to CTE**Serial**TestSuite.TestSpillToDisk
2. change code: Wait for the end of iterOutTbl's spilling to disk.
3. On my local machine, run this test for 1000 times, the result looks good. `go test . -test.count 1000 -check.f CTESerialTestSuite.TestSpillToDisk`

### Related changes


### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Side effects: no, just change case


### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No Release not

failure_signature: Problem Summary: CTETestSuite.TestSpillToDisk is unstable. | "select c1 from cte1 order by c1;", rowNum) (executor/cte_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Problem Summary: CTETestSuite.TestSpillToDisk is unstable.
